metadata.description: Rails 8 & Hotwire development skills — vanilla-first stack, pure RSpec, Turbo/Stimulus/Hotwire Native, OpenAPI via rswag, ruby_llm, Kamal 2

plugins.name: rails-stack
plugins.description: Rails 8.1 + Hotwire development doctrine: vanilla-first stack, pure RSpec testing, Turbo/Stimulus/Hotwire Native, OpenAPI docs via rswag, ruby_llm AI features, Kamal 2 deployment. Bundles the rails-8 and hotwire skills.

plugins.name: rails-flow
plugins.description: Agentic development flow for Rails 8 projects — /feature, /fix, /review, /setup-flow and /brain commands, eight specialist subagents (developer, migration-writer, code-reviewer, test-runner, security-auditor, design-auditor, doc-updater, pr-reviewer), and guardrail hooks that mechanically enforce spec-proven changes, safe migrations and git discipline. Pairs with the rails-stack skills.
